---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**To reproduce**
Steps (e.g. 1. Flash built-in Matrix_Clock 2. Click Serial monitor) and what you expected vs what happened.

**Environment**
- Host (e.g. Raspberry Pi, Ubuntu)
- Docker image (arduino-remote-flasher)
- Arduino board (e.g. Nano clone)
- Port (e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0)

**Log/output**
Paste relevant log output or error messages.
